blockers.description: S2 API key requested but not yet approved. Unauthenticated S2 hits ~1 rps limit.
blockers.workaround: Chain runs arXiv+InspireHEP first — S2 is last-resort fallback. Modern papers resolve without S2. Set S2_API_KEY=<key> when approved.

human_actions_pending.context: Non-blocking for modern corpus. Speeds up rare S2 fallback calls.

decisions.decision: Modern corpus approach: ar5iv+InspireHEP primary, S2 fallback
decisions.rationale: Pre-2015 cond-mat papers have no arXiv HTML links; S2 unauthenticated too slow. Modern papers resolve cleanly.

decisions.decision: ChainedPaperSource sequential fallback: arxiv → inspirehep → semanticscholar
decisions.rationale: arXiv primary (ar5iv fallback built-in). InspireHEP for physics. S2 last resort. Rate limiter = first source (arXiv 3s cadence).
Preserves Kuramoto comparability and T3 on Feynman. Modern pairs work without pre-2015 crawl success.

decisions.decision: Recommended seed: 1902.04760 (Wide Neural Networks, Greg Yang)
decisions.rationale: cond-mat.dis-nn+math-ph cross-listed; bridges RMT and ML; InspireHEP-indexed.

next_action: Fill m01 stub in modern_lbd_pairs.json: find post-2018 spin-glass paper pairing with 2008.02217. Verify via arXiv API. Then run crawl (task 13).
